hero.name: Garv
hero.bio: A passionate developer building high-tech, scalable solutions. Transforming complex problems into elegant, user-centric interfaces and powerful backend systems.

about.title: About Me
about.content: I am a final year B.Tech CSE Student with a strong interest in AI/ML and Full Stack Development.
about.details: My journey is defined by a curiosity to learn and apply new technologies. I enjoy building intelligent applications and exploring the depths of machine learning algorithms. I am eager to contribute to innovative projects and grow as a developer.

projects.title: Autonomous GitHub Issue Resolver
projects.problem: PLACEHOLDER — Open-source maintainers drown in repetitive issue triage and small fixes.
projects.impact: PLACEHOLDER — An autonomous AI agent that reads GitHub issues, plans a fix, edits code, and opens PRs.
projects.description: PLACEHOLDER PROJECT — details to be filled in when the project ships. An autonomous AI agent that resolves GitHub issues end-to-end.

projects.title: LLM Evaluation CI/CD Pipeline
projects.problem: PLACEHOLDER — LLM regressions ship silently without automated evaluation gates.
projects.impact: PLACEHOLDER — A CI/CD pipeline that runs eval suites on every change and blocks regressions before deploy.
projects.description: PLACEHOLDER PROJECT — details to be filled in when the project ships. An LLM evaluation pipeline integrated into CI/CD.

projects.title: Health-Intelligence-Agent
projects.problem: Medical report analysis needed an intelligent, multi-model approach for accurate health insights.
projects.impact: Enabled secure PDF ingestion and personalized health recommendations through cascading LLM models.
projects.description: Built an agent-based AI system for medical report analysis using a multi-model LLM cascade with fallback logic. Enabled PDF ingestion, personalized health insights, secure authentication, session tracking, and real-time UI using Streamlit and Supabase.

projects.title: Resume Analysis App
projects.problem: Job seekers needed a way to optimize resumes against job descriptions with actionable feedback.
projects.impact: Provided matching scores and insights to help candidates tailor applications effectively.
projects.description: An intelligent tool utilizing a RAG pipeline to analyze resumes against job descriptions. Provides actionable insights and matching scores to optimize job applications.

projects.title: Plant Pal
projects.problem: Farmers needed quick, accurate plant disease detection without expert consultation.
projects.impact: Provided confidence-level predictions with prevention tips and product recommendations.
projects.description: End-to-end plant disease predictor using a tailored CNN model. Features confidence levels, prevention tips, cure recommendations, product links, and an NLP-powered chatbot assistant.

projects.title: Amazon Price Tracker
projects.problem: Users wanted real-time price tracking for boAt products with automatic notifications.
projects.impact: Automated price monitoring with instant email alerts when drops occurred.
projects.description: Automated price tracking bot for boAt products. Scrapes Amazon real-time using BeautifulSoup and alerts users via SMTP email notifications when prices drop.

projects.title: Desktop Assistant
projects.problem: Users needed hands-free desktop control through voice commands.
projects.impact: Enabled seamless voice-activated automation for common desktop tasks.
projects.description: Voice-activated personal assistant for desktop automation. Performs tasks like opening applications, web browsing, and system control using speech recognition commands.

projects.title: Doctor Appointment System
projects.problem: Healthcare providers needed a digital solution for appointment booking and management.
projects.impact: Streamlined patient-doctor scheduling with secure authentication.
projects.description: Comprehensive MERN stack application for booking medical appointments. Features patient profiles, doctor availability management, and secure scheduling workflow.

projects.title: Smart File Organizer
projects.problem: Users had unorganized file systems that were hard to navigate.
projects.impact: Automated file categorization with detailed operation logging.
projects.description: Automates file organization by categorizing files into folders based on extensions or dates. Includes detailed logging for tracking operations.

projects.title: Stock Price Prediction App
projects.problem: Investors needed predictive models to forecast stock price trends.
projects.impact: Provided LSTM-based predictions with historical data visualization.
projects.description: Predicts stock prices using LSTM neural networks. Visualizes historical data and future trends with Matplotlib, utilizing Yahoo Finance for real-time data.

projects.title: AI Virtual Keyboard
projects.problem: Users needed contactless input methods for touchless interaction.
projects.impact: Enabled gesture-based typing without physical keyboard.
projects.description: A contactless virtual keyboard utilizing computer vision to detect fingertip movements. Simulates keystrokes for typing without physical interaction.

experience.description: Developing Localized Quick Services in React (frontend) and Java and Spring Boot (backend).
Secured 5th place by Contributing to open-source projects and gained experience in collaborative development.
Developed an End to End Application using AI/ML, deep learning CNN model for image classification of Plant Diseases with chatbot interface.

education.description: Specialization in Computer Science and Engineering
Main Stream in Maths, Physics and Chemistry

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's Talk
contact.message: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas within tech or opportunities to be part of your visions.
